confirmation.note: WeChat, Juejin, and Zhihu drafts were created. No official publish action was taken.

notes: Chinese V1 defaults to draft creation only. WeChat must use md2wechat; Juejin and Zhihu may require browser/Wechatsync manual completion.
heroImage added to source frontmatter before publishing: ./assets/01-photo-01-rag-chain.png
md2wechat convert --mode ai returned CONVERT_AI_REQUEST_READY; final autumn-warm-compatible HTML was generated locally from the prepared prompt requirements.
SVG body image was converted to PNG for WeChat upload because upload_image rejected SVG as unsupported.
WeChat HTML static check passed: 16 text fences rendered as note-block, 6 body images replaced with mmbiz.qpic.cn URLs, no local image paths remained.
Retry after .env update: WECHATSYNC_TOKEN was present in shell, but Wechatsync Chrome Extension still returned Invalid or missing token for Juejin and Zhihu.
Wechatsync reconnect succeeded: platforms -a showed zhihu and juejin authenticated, then both single-platform drafts were created.
